query:
SELECT 'tracks' as tbl, userId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM tracks WHERE userId IN (5730001, 34620001) GROUP BY userId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'music_generations', userId, COUNT(*) FROM music_generations WHERE userId IN (5730001, 34620001) GROUP BY userId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'playlists', userId, COUNT(*) FROM playlists WHERE userId IN (5730001, 34620001) GROUP BY userId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'style_library', userId, COUNT(*) FROM style_library WHERE userId IN (5730001, 34620001) GROUP BY userId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'profiles', userId, COUNT(*) FROM profiles WHERE userId IN (5730001, 34620001) GROUP BY userId;
